Name: CAMERA_EXFOLLOW_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters relating to the camera during boss fights.

Fields.Name: Camera Behavior Type
Fields.Description: The behavior to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Camera Reference Point Type
Fields.Description: The reference point to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Field of View
Fields.Description: The field of view (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Collision Size
Fields.Description: The collision size of the camera.

Fields.Name: Reference Point Offset: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The reference point position offset on the x-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Reference Point Offset: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The reference point position offset on the y-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Reference Point Offset: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The reference point position offset on the z-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Reference Point Distance
Fields.Description: The distance the camera is pushed back from the reference point (in metres).

Fields.Name: Horizontal Movement: Maximum Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum distance (in metres) of the horizontal movement distance ratio for the camera.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Movement: Minimum Distance %
Fields.Description: The minimum distance rate for the horizontal movement distance ratio used by the camera.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Movement: Maximum Distance %
Fields.Description: The maximum distance rate for the horizontal movement distance ratio used by the camera.

Fields.Name: Fulcrum Distance %
Fields.Description: The support distance ratio.

Fields.Name: Character: X-Axis Position Tracking %
Fields.Description: The camera position tracking rate on the x-axis for character.

Fields.Name: Character: X-Axis Position Tracking % (Wall Avoidance)
Fields.Description: The camera position tracking rate on the x-axis for charactert.

Fields.Name: Target: X-Axis Position Tracking %
Fields.Description: The camera position tracking rate on the x-axis for a target.

Fields.Name: Target: X-Axis Rotation Tracking %
Fields.Description: The camera rotation tracking rate on the x-axis for a target.

Fields.Name: Target: Normalized XZ-Axis Tracking %
Fields.Description: The camera tracking rate on normalized x/z-axis for a target.

Fields.Name: Target: Normalized XZ-Axis Tracking % (Wall Avoidance)
Fields.Description: The camera tracking rate on normalized x/z-axis for a target.

Fields.Name: Target: Y-Axis Position Tracking %
Fields.Description: The camera position tracking rate on the y-axis for a target.

Fields.Name: Target: Y-Axis - Minimum Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum angle (in degrees) when tracking on the y-axis for a target.

Fields.Name: Target: Y-Axis - Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum angle (in degrees) when tracking on the y-axis for a target.

Fields.Name: Target: Distance Tracking %
Fields.Description: The camera distance tracking rate for a target.

Fields.Name: Locked Target: XZ-Axis Tracking %
Fields.Description: The camera tracking rate on x/z-axis for a locked target..

Fields.Name: Locked Target: Y-Axis Tracking %
Fields.Description: The camera tracking rate on y-axis for a locked target..

Fields.Name: Locked Target: Minimum Tracking Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum tracking angle (in degrees), for a locked target.

Fields.Name: Locked Target: Maximum Tracking Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum tracking angle (in degrees), for a locked target.

Fields.Name: Position Tracking Wait Time
Fields.Description: The position tracking wait duration (in seconds) after operation completion.

Fields.Name: Position Tracking Release Time
Fields.Description: The position tracking release duration (in seconds) after operation completion.

Fields.Name: Rotation Tracking Wait Time
Fields.Description: The rotation tracking wait duration (in seconds) after operation completion.

Fields.Name: Rotation Tracking Release Time
Fields.Description: The rotation tracking release duration (in seconds) after operation completion.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed Increase Time
Fields.Description: The increase time (in seconds) for fast turn rate.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Minimum Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Rotation: X-Axis - Minimum Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation when locked-on.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Rotation: X-Axis - Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation when locked-on.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Rotation: X-Axis - Interpolation Start Height
Fields.Description: The interpolation lerp start height (in metres) during lock-on x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Rotation: X-Axis - Interpolation End Height
Fields.Description: The interpolation lerp end height (in metres) during lock-on x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y-Axis - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the y-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y-Axis - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the y-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed: X-Axis - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the fast turn on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed: X-Axis - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the fast turn on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed: Y-Axis - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the fast turn on the y-axis.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed: Y-Axis - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the fast turn on the y-axis.

Fields.Name: Direct Pitch Angle
Fields.Description: The direct pitching angle of the camera (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Direct Pitch %
Fields.Description: The direct pitching rate of the camera.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Rotation: Tracking %
Fields.Description: The lock-on rotation tracking rate for the camera.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Rotation: Tracking Play Angle
Fields.Description: The lock-on rotation tracking play angle (in degrees) for the camera.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Rotation: X-Axis Shift %
Fields.Description: The shift rate of the lock-on rotation for the camera.

Fields.Name: Forced Forward Lock Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) of the forced forward lock for the camera.

Fields.Name: Update Target X-Axis Rotation on Lock
Fields.Description: If enabled, the target x-axis rotation is updated upon camera lock.

Fields.Name: Update Target X-Axis Rotation on Forward Lock
Fields.Description: If enabled, the target x-axis rotation is updated upon camera forward lock.

Fields.Name: Enable Lock Camera Adjustments
Fields.Description: If enabled, lock adjustments are applied to the camera

Fields.Name: Lock Camera: X-Axis Rotation - Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum value (in degrees) of x-axis rotation applied via lock camera adjustments.

Fields.Name: Lock Camera: Y-Axis Rotation - Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum value (in degrees) of y-axis rotation applied via lock camera adjustments.

Fields.Name: Lock Camera: Rotation Tracking %
Fields.Description: The rotation trackin rate of the lock camera adjustments.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Y-Axis Rotation - Addition
Fields.Description: The y-axis rotation (in degrees per second) added during wall avoidance for this camera.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Y-Axis Rotation - Maximum
Fields.Description: The y-axis rotation (in degrees per second) maximum used during wall avoidance for this camera.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Rotation Decay %
Fields.Description: The rotation decay rate of rotation adjustments during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Wing Angle
Fields.Description: The wing angle (in degrees) used during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Wing Length
Fields.Description: The wing length (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Wing Radius
Fields.Description: The wing radius (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Wing Spacing
Fields.Description: The wing spacing (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Minimum Reset Time
Fields.Description: The minimum duration (in seconds) for camera reset.

Fields.Name: Maximum Reset Time
Fields.Description: The maximum duration (in seconds) for camera reset.

Fields.Name: Reset Speed Change %
Fields.Description: The camera reset speed change rate for this camera.

Fields.Name: Parameter Application Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) for parameter application for this camera.

Fields.Name: Locked Character: Position Tracking %
Fields.Description: The position tracking rate used by the camera when a character is locked-on.

Fields.Name: Locked Target: Position Tracking %
Fields.Description: The position tracking rate used by the camera when a target is locked-on.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Rotation: Tracking % Application Time
Fields.Description: The tracking rate application time (in seconds) during lock-on rotation.

Fields.Name: Enable Rotation Brake
Fields.Description: If enabled, rotation brake may be used.

Fields.Name: Enable Reverse Brake Correction
Fields.Description: If enabled, reverse brake correction may be used.

Fields.Name: Rotation Brake: X-Axis Rotation Brake Time
Fields.Description: The braking time (in seconds) for brake action on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Rotation Brake: Fast Turn X-Axis Brake Time
Fields.Description: The braking time (in seconds) for brake action for the fast turn on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Rotation Brake: Y-Axis Rotation Brake Time
Fields.Description: The braking time (in seconds) for brake action on the y-axis.

Fields.Name: Rotation Brake: Fast Turn Y-Axis Brake Time
Fields.Description: The braking time (in seconds) for brake action for the fast turn on the y-axis.
